-- 1 of 15 --

ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
Seed Launch Planner
Overview
Seed Launches are awesome –
they’re simple and they’re fast.
You want to do a Seed Launch
if:
¨ You’re just starting out
¨ You have no list or a tiny
list
¨ If you want to create a
new product
¨ If you have an existing
business and you want to
roll out a new product
¨ If you want to test or
validate a product idea
¨ If you want to get
testimonials and case
studies
¨ If you want to get paid to
create the product
¨ If you want to create a
product that your
audience wants (and stop
second guessing)
¨ If you want to stop
procrastinating and
finally create your product
Before you start your Seed Launch, be sure you’ve
completed the following Milestones:
1. 	Select/Narrow Your Niche
(See the “Select a Niche Bonus” and complete the
exercise if you haven’t already)
What is your Niche? ____________________
2. 	Clearly Define Your Avatar
(See “Your Avatar, Parts 1 & 2” in Module 1 and
complete the exercise if you haven’t already)
Describe your Avatar: ____________________
__________________________________
__________________________________
__________________________________
__________________________________
3. 	Identify the Topic or Product or Service You’ll Offer
What will you Launch? ___________________
__________________________________
__________________________________

Seed Launch Planner
o 	Step 1: Build Your Seed List
¨ Set up your Email Platform
(There are a lot of options but
Aweber or MailChimp are great
choices when you’re getting
started)
¨ Create a Lead Magnet
§ 	Easily consumable
§ 	Actionable
§ 	Valuable
¨ Set up your Landing Page (Again,
lots of options but Leadpages or
ClickFunnels is easy and quick for
getting set up)
§ 	Any opt-in page is better than
no opt-in page – get it set up –
then you can test and modify
from there
§ 	The headline matters most
§ 	What you’re giving away (and
how you describe/ name it)
matters
¨ Start driving traffic to your opt-in
page
§ 	Email – send individual
emails to people that might be
interested (current or past
clients, personal contacts, etc.)
§ 	Participate in communities,
(forums, Facebook or
LinkedIn groups, etc.)
§ 	Start publishing (blog posts,
guest posts, post on social
media, YouTube, etc.)
§ 	Consider paid traffic
¨ Get your list to a minimum of 50
- 300 is ideal –more is Ok too!
What Email Provider did you choose?
___________________________________
What Program did you choose for building your Landing
Page?
__________________________________
__________________________________
What is your Lead Magnet Name?
__________________________________
What is your Landing Page Headline?
__________________________________
What is your Lead Magnet Description/Call to Action?
__________________________________
__________________________________
__________________________________
How will you drive traffic to your Landing Page?
__________________________________
__________________________________
__________________________________
Remember to email your list every week (do not let it go
cold –build the relationship with your list by sending
valuable information regularly).

1

o 	Step 2: Develop Your Offer
¨ Clearly define the
transformation your offer
provides – describe your offer in
terms of the transformation
your clients will get
¨ Choose one main method to
deliver your product (e.g. live
event, webinar, membership
site, expert interview series,
coaching calls, etc.)
¨ Add high value pieces to make
the offer more enticing (e.g.
recordings, coaching, etc.)
¨ Add bonus(es) to create more
value
§ 	Bonuses that fill any gaps
§ 	Bonuses that help overcome
objections
¨ Finalize structure and timing of
delivery
¨ Decide on your pricing and
terms
¨ Define your guarantee

clients will get:

__________________________________

__________________________________
Define your Guarantee:
__________________________________

ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
Seed Launch Planner
o 	Step 3: Launch! 	(Shot across the bow)
First, the Shot Across the Bow…
¨ Create a Prelaunch Survey
(surveymonkey, surveygizmo,
google forms, etc.)
¨ Create and Send a “Shot Across
the Bow” Email
When they answer this question
they’re going to be basically giving
you their objections. That’s going to
tell you a lot about what you need
to cover in your Prelaunch Content
video and in your Sales Video.
You’re basically surfacing
objections here.
Even if they don’t go through the
survey, just sending them that email
and sending them the survey
accomplishes the Shot Across the
Bow and it gets the message out
that you have something coming.
The Shot Across the Bow is just sort
of a warning shot.
Use the following sample email copy to draft your Shot
Across the Bow email:
Subject: Need Your Help, Please
Ok -­‐ after literally [weeks/months/years] of work, I’m
putting the finishing touches on my long awaited
[program/product name].
This thing has been a labor of love, but at times it has felt
like giving birth. However, now that the finish line is in sight
I could really use your help.
You see, I want to make sure that I’ve covered everything,
but I’m a little too close to this project right now. Now that
I’m almost finished I’d like to get some feedback from you.
This will only take you a few seconds. Can you go to this
link and answer this one simple question?
(insert link to survey)
Thanks,
[Your Name]
Survey Template:
(At the top of survey – include the same text you have in
your email ^^) … then ask the following:
What are you top two questions about [topic you’re going
to be offering]?
STEP
3
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 15 --

ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
Seed Launch Planner
o 	Step 3: Launch! 	(Create PLC video or post)
Next, create your Prelaunch
Content (PLC) Video (doesn’t have
to be video; it can be a blog post)
¨ Start with a short Intro
§ 	Who you are
§ 	What the video/post is about
o Putting final touches on
program
o You’re going to answer
some questions you got on
the survey
¨ Next – teach the Content
§ 	High-level teaching on the
five parts you go deep on in
your program (or how ever
many you have)
§ 	Explain each topic, how to
do it in broad parameters,
and the actual
transformation – the
benefits / results of each
¨ Transition to Close (of the video)
§ 	This is awesome
§ 	Who it’s going to be for
¨ Quick Offer Preview
§ 	Topics and delivery format
§ 	Scarcity
§ 	Price Juxtaposition
¨ Call to Action
§ 	Opt-in to be notified when
program opens (or watch
your inbox for details…
comment below on what
your biggest challenges are,
etc.)
Use the following sample script to draft your Prelaunch
Content (modify to fit your personality/situation):
Hey, it’s [Your Name] and today I want to talk to you about
[Topic]. [Define/explain what that topic ^ is and the benefit
of knowing it.]
A couple days ago I sent out an email asking for your top
questions on this topic and I was completely overwhelmed
by the response so I thought I would shoot a quick video
and teach you a little about [your topic].
[Draft out your teaching on the 5-­‐parts of your topic, in
broad parameters, give valuable information, and focus on
the benefits, results of each.]
[This topic] is awesome. And it’s not just for [give scenario
of who it’s for]. It’s also for [this avatar/ situation] and it’s
for you if [another avatar or situation].
I just love [this topic]. I’ve been [doing/teaching/helping
others] with [this topic]. Lately I’ve gotten so many
questions, so much positive feedback, that I've decided to
do a deep dive training just on [this topic].
This training is going to be specifically on [your topic] -­‐ It's
gonna go deep on those five steps I just talked about.
We’re going to do [5 live calls]. The first call is going to be
about [achieving/accomplishing this]. In the second call
you’ll learn how you can [achieve this] … (etc.) It’s going to
be coming out very, very soon. There’s going to be a limited
number of spots because [explain why].
This is the deal, somewhere on this page there's going to
be a little form where you can enter your email address. If
you're interested in being on our contact list, then enter
your email in that form. If you go ahead and put your email
address in that form right now, then I'll send you an email
in the next few days when we open up registration for the
[program name].
STEP
3

Seed Launch Planner
o 	Step 3: Launch! 	(Create & Send email about PLC)
Now, draft and send your (PLC)
email:
¨ Remind them about the survey
email you sent
¨ Social proof – give # of
responses or say you’ve received
an overwhelming response
¨ Provide link to video (or blog
post)
¨ Authority – include a P.S. with
authority and second call to
action
Use the following sample email copy to draft your PLC
email:
Subject: VIDEO: answers about [Topic]…
Last week I put out a call for your help in putting the final
touches in place before I release my new course-­‐ and the
response was overwhelming!
We got so many questions about [topic] which is
understandable because [topic] is such a [great/easy] way
to [accomplish this].
Rather than try and answer all those questions via email, I
decided to just go ahead and shoot a video (or write a blog
post). This video walks you through the five primary steps
to [do/accomplish this].
You can watch the video at the link below (no opt-­‐in
required):
CLICK HERE for the [topic] video
best regards,
[Your Name]
P.S. I've been [doing/teaching/helping others with] [your
topic] for [period of time] and there’s no better way to
[accomplish this] ... CLICK HERE for the [topic] video
STEP
3
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 15 --

ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
Seed Launch Planner
o 	Step 3: Launch! 	(Create Sales page/video)
Next, create your Sales Video/Page:
¨ This can be a video (direct to
camera or even just a
screencap), or a standard sales
letter
¨ Start with a short Intro
§ 	This is for you if…
§ 	Talk about the
transformation
§ 	Hit on scarcity
§ 	Hit on authority
¨ Next – the body
§ 	A lot of the same material as
the offer preview in your
PLC video
¨ Transition to the Close
§ 	This is for you
§ 	Hit on scarcity
§ 	Hit on objections
§ 	Clarify offer
§ 	Reinforce the
transformation
¨ The Close
§ 	Price anchoring and
instructions
§ 	Guarantee
§ 	Bonuses – all about the
benefits/transformation
§ 	Re-close with scarcity
§ 	Call to action
§ 	Assumption of the close
Use the following sample script to draft your Prelaunch Content
(modify to fit your personality/situation):
Hey, it’s [Your Name]. If you made it this far, if you’re watching
this video, that tells me a couple things. First of all, you’re
interested in [program name]. Second, there’s at least one spot
still available, otherwise we would have already pulled down the
video.
This is the deal -­‐ [This topic] is for you if [give scenario of who it’s
for]. It’s also for [this avatar/ situation] and it’s for you if
[another avatar or situation]. I just love [this topic]. I’ve been
[doing/teaching/helping others achieve these results] for [time
period]. I want you to [experience/have this] too.
This training is going to go deep on these five steps. We’re going
to do [5 live calls]. The first call is going to be about [achieving
/accomplishing this]. In the second call you’ll learn how you can
[achieve this] … (etc.). You’ll also get [worksheets, homework,
resources, community, etc.]
Again, this is a very interactive process, I’ll be taking your
questions live, you’re going to be able to get access to me, just
you and a very small group of people. I don’t have some big fancy
pitch for this. If you’ve made it this far there is at least one more
space available, probably more than one.
We’ll be starting our first call on [date] then we’ll have another 4
calls every [x#] of days until you’ve [learned this so you can
achieve this transformation]. Don’t worry if [list common
objection & address how your program/delivery will overcome it.]
Normally my students pay more than $xx to learn from me. But
the way I’ve been able to put this thing together we’re going to
have a small interactive training and because of the way we’re
putting this together I’m able to keep the price down to $xxx, so
it’s not going to cost you $xxx to learn from me. Just click the
button below to get started immediately and join me in the
[program name]. Of course, like everything I offer, it's 100%
guaranteed.
Once I learned how to do this, I [accomplished/ achieved these
results]. And I want to help you do this too. There's one thing I
can't do. I can't click that button; I can't click that registration.
Only you can do that. Go ahead, click that button, and I’ll see you
in the [name of program].
STEP
3

o 	Step 3: Launch! 	(Create & send email about open cart)
Now, draft and send your Sales
Video/Page email:
¨ Get right to the point
¨ Provide link to sales page
¨ Scarcity - reiterate a limited
number of spots
¨ Second call to action w/link
Use the following sample email copy to draft your Sales
Video / Sales Page email:
Subject: we're open: {program name] registration...
Super quick... registration for my new [program name] is
now open.
CLICK HERE: [program name] registration details
A few important things:
1. 	There are a very limited number of spots. I'm keeping
this small -­‐ it's a very under-­‐the-­‐radar interactive
training with me, so I'm going to limit the class size.
And many of the spots were already pre-­‐registered.
2. 	Because of the limited spots, there's no big launch or
fancy sales video. I've just got a super-­‐short [#]-­‐ minute
video that explains the program.
3. 	Pricing is crazy low for this level of program... but I just
wanted to fill the remaining seats and get started.
Registration won't be open for long.
That's about it -­‐ if you're interested, check it out now... it
won't be around long:
CLICK HERE: [program name] registration details.
best regards,
[Your Name]
STEP
3
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Seed Launch Planner
o 	Step 3: Launch! 	(Create & send follow-up emails)
Finally, draft & be ready to send
your follow-up emails:
¨ Follow-up if you don’t fill up
right away
¨ Day 8 – It’s exciting to see how
many people have signed up –
there’s so much excitement,
remember we start on X date so
here’s how to sign up…
¨ Day 9 – Reminder - registration
closes tomorrow… click here for
full details…
¨ Day 9 - >>> use this >> sample
copy on cart close day or if you
fill up faster than expected
¨ If necessary, send another email
3-hours before cart closes- last
call… don’t want anyone upset
because they missed it – we’re
closing in 3 hours… here’s how
to join
Use the following sample email copy as a starting point
for your follow-­‐up emails:
Subject: closing today: [program name] registration…
OK, I know we only opened up registration {# hours/days]
ago... but we've filled up the [program name] way faster
than I expected.
That means I'm going to be closing registration TODAY...
frankly, I'm not sure when we'll sell the last spot, but the
LATEST I'll shut it down is [time, time zone]. And there's a
good chance we'll fill up sooner than that.
If you're interested, check it out now... your time is
extremely limited.
CLOSING TODAY: the [program name – link to sales page]
A few important things:
1. 	We're closing down today (date) at [time] OR SOONER.
Don't delay.
2. 	Because of the limited spots, there's no big launch or
fancy sales video. I've just got a super-­‐short [#]-­‐minute
video that explains the program.
3. 	Pricing is crazy low for this level of program... but I just
wanted to fill the remaining seats and get started.
Registration won't be open for long.
4. 	This is your final warning. I won't be sending another
email about this training.
That's about it -­‐ if you're interested, check it out now... it
won't be around long:
CLOSING TODAY: the [program name – link to sales page]
best regards,
[Your Name]
STEP
3

o 	Step 4: Create & Deliver your product
You did it! You LAUNCHED!
Congratulations! Now it’s time to
create and deliver your product:
Creating your product:
¨ Select a program for delivering
your content (GoToWebinar,
freeconferncecall.com, google
hangouts, etc.)
¨ Make sure you test, practice,
record, get familiar with
capabilities of whatever
program you choose
¨ Plan out your content
¨ Split into 5 general topic areas
(can be more or less - whatever
is best for your content)
¨ Decide which topic makes sense
to deliver first (you can always
pivot and rearrange the order
as you go)
¨ Create one call at a time as you
go
¨ First call – include an
introduction to the course and
what’s covered, how it works,
ground rules, etc.
¨ Be sure to record each call
¨ Add a bonus Q&A call
What program did you choose for delivering your content?
___________________________________
Use the following outline as a starting point for planning
out each call:
1. 	Introduction
(What’s going to be covered and WHY)
2. 	Five Subtopics
(For each subtopic, think about and cover the three
most important points on that topic)
3. 	Then cover the 3 biggest mistakes people make (as
it relates to this call’s topic)
4. 	Address the 3 biggest objections or obstacles
people have
5. 	Answer the top 5-­‐10 questions people asked about
this topic
6. 	Conclusion
(Quick review, motivation and encouragement)
Note: you don’t have to cover all of these things, you may
have more or less questions, objections, etc.… include them
when necessary and appropriate. Plan on 60 minutes of
content followed by 30 minutes of follow-­‐up questions (and
modify for your program/audience, etc.)
STEP
4
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 15 --

ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
Seed Launch Planner
o 	Step 4: Create & Deliver your product
Delivering your product:
¨ Set up surveys for feedback
ahead of the first call and
between each call
(surveymonkey, surveygizmo,
google forms, etc.)
¨ Keep your survey as simple and
clean as possible and if you have
multiple questions, consider
splitting them up into multiple
pages.
¨ Tip: Use a redirect link like
bit.ly to insert your survey into
the emails so you can change or
replace the survey if necessary
without having broken links.
Survey Template:
OK... it's almost time for our [first, second, third, etc.]
training!
I'm working on the call right now -­‐ it's all about [topic]. I
know there are tons of questions about this topic -­‐ and I
want to make sure I get them answered...
So I need to know your top questions about [topic].
thanks!
[Your Name]
1. 	Do you have any questions left from our LAST CALL
about [topic]? (<<Don’t include this question if it’s your
pre-­‐call survey ahead of your first call.)
2. 	I need your questions for [the NEXT CALL/our first call] -­‐
which is all about [topic] -­‐ what are your top two
questions?
[Submit]
[Page 2]
Please tell me who you are in case I have any follow up
questions for you:
Name:
Email Address:
[Done]
STEP
4
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

o 	Step 4: Create & Deliver your product
Deliver your product:
¨ Draft your program emails
¨ Send an email to the survey
after each call
Use the following sample email copy as a starting point
for your follow-­‐up emails:
Subject: UPDATE #[1]: [Program Name]
OK, a super-­‐quick update about the [Program Name] ...
It's important you read this entire email -­‐ I'll keep it as brief
as possible. So let's get started...
1. 	The super-­‐important survey. I really need your help
in prepping for our [first/next] call. This will literally
take you 90 seconds or less... but it's really
important for several reasons. So please go fill this
out right now:
[Link to Survey]
2. 	Our [first/next] call is TOMORROW -­‐ that's [date]
The call will be at [time]. It will last about 90
minutes. You can register for the call here:
[Link to Call]
3. 	Our [first/next] session will be all about [topic].
Finally, if you have any questions or need any help, please
email support@yourwebsite.com
best regards,
[Your Name}
STEP
4
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

CONGRATULATIONS!!!!!!
You have successfully created /
tested / validated your product!
(You should Celebrate!)
Now, start preparing your product
for your next launch:
¨ (Important - keep building your
list)
¨ Get recorded calls transcribed
(rev.com, fiverr, etc.)
¨ Edit/clean-up videos/audios if
needed
¨ Create additional resources to
address any gaps
¨ Create & send a post-program
survey and gather testimonials
¨ Create Case Studies from your
star student’s experiences /
successes
¨ Start looking ahead at doing an
Internal Launch ;-)
Looking ahead and planning for what’s next:
What do you need to do before your next launch?
_____________________________________________

Schedule it:

ProductLaunchFormula.com 	© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
Seed Launch Planner
Seed LAUNCH Summary / CHECKLIST
STEP 1: Build Your Seed List (30-­‐60 Days Prior)
¨ 	Immediately: Start Building your Seed List
¨ 	Create a Lead Magnet
¨ 	Sign up for an Email Service
¨ 	Set up an Opt-­‐in Page
¨ 	Start Driving Traffic
¨ 	Keep Your List Warm (weekly emails with value)
¨ 	Get your list to at least 50 (but 300 is best and
bigger is OK)
STEP 2: Develop Your Offer (7-­‐14 Days Prior)
¨ 	Clearly define the transformation your offer
provides
¨ 	Choose one main method to deliver your product
¨ 	Add high value pieces to make the offer more
enticing
¨ 	Add bonus(es) to create more value
¨ 	Finalize structure and timing of delivery
¨ 	Decide on your pricing and terms
¨ 	Define your guarantee
STEP 3: Launch! (7-­‐10 Days)
¨ 	Create your Shot Across the Bow email
¨ 	Create your Survey
¨ 	Day 1: Initial Announcement – Send your Shot
Across the Bow email
¨ 	Analyze your survey results
¨ 	Outline and create your Prelaunch Content
¨ 	Write your email for your PLC
¨ 	Day 3: Follow Up – Send Email to your PLC
¨ 	Outline and Create your Sales Letter (or video)
and webpage
¨ 	Set up your Shopping Cart/ Product/Buy Now
Button/and test on your Sales Page
¨ 	Write your email announcement that tells people
the program is open
¨ 	Day 7: Release Program (Open Cart) -­‐ Send email
to your Sales Page
¨ 	Day 8: Write and send a Follow-­‐up email
¨ 	Day 9: Write and send your “Closing Tomorrow”
email
¨ 	Day 10: Write & send your “Cart Close” email
¨ 	Day 10: Midnight – Close Cart
STEP 4: Create and Deliver Your Product (1-­‐6
weeks depending on call release schedule)
¨ 	Set up and test your teleseminar/webinar
software
¨ 	Create your Pre-­‐call Survey
¨ 	Write and send your 1st call email
¨ 	Create outline/slides for your 1st call
¨ 	Day 11: Start Program (can start it a couple
days later – but plan and include timing in
your offer)
¨ 	Create follow-­‐up survey and email and send
¨ 	Create outline/slides for 2nd call
¨ 	Day 18: Second Module
¨ 	Create follow-­‐up survey and email and send
¨ 	Create outline/slides for 3rd call
¨ 	Day 25: Third Module
¨ 	Create follow-­‐up survey and email and send
¨ 	Can be anywhere from three to X# modules
¨ 	Add Bonus Q&A Call
